pi_items.source: Task description (line 5 of task.json) explicitly states: 'Find the location named Satellite Clinic'. Metadata claim matches task description exactly. Setup script (setup_task.sh line 47) creates location with name 'Satellite Clinic' if it doesn't exist. Export script (export_result.sh line 18) queries for this location by name.

Task description (line 5 of task.json) explicitly states: 'setting its Facility Code attribute'. Metadata claim matches task description exactly. Setup script (setup_task.sh lines 24-30) creates attribute type with name 'Facility Code' if it doesn't exist. Export script (export_result.sh line 51) searches for attribute with display name 'Facility Code'.

Task description (line 5 of task.json) explicitly states: 'setting its Facility Code attribute to FAC-8829'. Metadata claim matches task description exactly. Verifier script (verifier.py line 46) reads expected_value from metadata with default 'FAC-8829', and line 80-82 checks if actual value equals this expected value.

Analysis of environment setup: (1) Setup script (setup_task.sh) dynamically creates both the location 'Satellite Clinic' and attribute type 'Facility Code' if they don't exist, indicating test data setup. (2) The facility code 'FAC-8829' is a synthetic test value - web search confirms this is a phased-out workers' compensation code, not a real healthcare facility identifier. (3) Bahmni is a real open-source system but this is a containerized test instance. (4) Credentials are default test credentials (superman/Admin123). (5) This is part of an AI agent benchmark framework with synthetic test tasks.

Task description and multiple scripts reference Bahmni. Web search confirms Bahmni (https://www.bahmni.org) is a real, open-source hospital management system built on OpenMRS, deployed globally managing over 2 million patient records. However, this instance is a containerized test environment with synthetic data.

Task description (line 5) explicitly states login with username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'. These credentials are confirmed in multiple scripts: task_utils.sh (lines 13-14), seed_bahmni.py (lines 226-228). These are standard default credentials for Bahmni test installations.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic test task for an AI agent benchmark operating on a containerized Bahmni (OpenMRS) test installation. The task specifies updating a location attribute with three test data values: location name 'Satellite Clinic', attribute type name 'Facility Code', and expected value 'FAC-8829'. All three metadata claims have been independently verified against the task description and setup/export scripts—they match exactly. The location and attribute type are created dynamically by setup scripts if they don't exist, confirming this is test data. The facility code FAC-8829 appears to be a test value (historically a phased-out workers' compensation classification code, not a real healthcare facility identifier). The system uses default test credentials (superman/Admin123) and runs in a containerized environment with only synthetic test data.
